title: Exploring Electronics
description: Electronics from first principles — voltage, current, resistance, and circuit design explained clearly. Real components, real numbers, no prior knowledge assumed.

items.title: Series and Parallel Circuits
items.content_html: Two wiring patterns govern every circuit ever built. Learn how series and parallel circuits work — why voltage divides in one and stays constant in the other.

items.title: Breadboards
items.content_html: How breadboard holes connect internally, how to use the power rails, and the wiring mistakes that kill every beginner's first circuit before it even starts.

items.title: What Is Electricity?
items.content_html: The label on your USB charger says 5V ⎓ 2A. Two numbers that explain how electricity works — voltage, current, resistance, and Ohm's Law explained clearly.

items.title: Home
items.content_html: Electronics from first principles — voltage, current, resistance, and circuit design explained clearly. Real components, real numbers, no prior knowledge assumed.
